response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience as a senior full-stack engineer with 6+ years of relevant experience, working across multiple modern stacks including TypeScript, Node.js, React, and AI-agent infrastructure. His roles show deep technical expertise in scalable systems, database design, and cloud technologies (AWS, Kubernetes), along with contributions to open-source projects and architecture decisions. He has led teams, improved processes, and delivered high-impact solutions across diverse industries.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and modern backend frameworks (Nest.js).
Proven track record in scaling systems, optimizing performance, and contributing to AI-agent infrastructure (MCP).
Demonstrated leadership in architecture, team mentorship, and open-source contributions (e.g., GISCollective).
concerns: Primary experience leans toward Node.js (TypeScript) rather than Kotlin/Java for backend services, which is a secondary requirement.
Limited explicit mention of testing frameworks (Jest/Vitest/Playwright) in the resume, despite strong testing advocacy in roles.
No direct experience with PostgreSQL/MySQL in recent roles; MongoDB is the primary database mentioned.
